lore.english:
An experimental robot originally developed by UFS  to replicate the flexible range of motion of the human body while achieveing extreme mobility performance.

As demons attack created a sever shortage of combat forces across its territories, the unit was urgently recovered and modernized as it was previously abanoned in storage.

Its outdated systems were overhauled with the latest tactical algorithms, and its previously vulnerable armor was replaced with high-strength special alloys, significantly improving combat survivability.

While absolutely obedient to its operator, it is also capable of independed judgment and action in response to rapidly changing combat situations through its high-performance computing system.

skills.name: [&Color_Orange][&DEF] Aura[-]
skills.description: Increase DEF of Power allies by 35% in Extermination
skills.description_readable: Increase DEF of Power allies by 35% in Extermination

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Impact Drive[-]
skills.description:
Stabs the enemy to attack.
Gains [&Shield] equal to [&Color_Cyan][V3:1840102]%[-] of Max. [&HP] [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionAfter].
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:1840102] turn(s)
skills.description_readable:
Stabs the enemy to attack.
Gains Shield equal to 19.5% of Max. HP after the attack.
Duration: 2 turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Merciless Rupture[-]
skills.description:
When attacking, inflicts the enemy with [&Color_Cyan]([V3:1840201]%)[-] [&Bleeding] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:1840201]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:1840201] turn(s)
skills.description_readable:
When attacking, inflicts the enemy with (10%) Bleed at a 15% chance.
Duration: 3 turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Round Slash[-]
skills.description:
Spins and attacks [&Common_Word_Skill_EnemyAll] [A:18403] times.
On every attack, inflicts the enemy with [&Color_Cyan]([V3:1840302]%)[-] [&Bleeding] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:1840302]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:1840302] turn(s)
skills.description_readable:
Spins and attacks ALL enemies 3 times.
On every attack, inflicts the enemy with (10%) Bleed at a 15% chance.
Duration: 3 turn(s)
